rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WILLIAM AND ESTHER WASSON LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Validity Of Trust And Confirming Assets To Revocable Trust
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner alleges that some of Settlors' children died before the surviving spouse but died after the deceased spouse. However, Petitioner has failed to identify those individuals and has failed to allege who their successors in interest are. 2) Court to determine whether petition should otherwise be granted as requested. 3) Notice: a.Felicia Racquipiso was not given notice (failed attempt was attached to Notice of Hearing) b.Mandatory language required under Probate Code §851(c) was not included in the notice.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOAN HOPE LIUZZI SPENDTHRIFT TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Appointment Of Successor Trustees, For Modification Of Trust To Provide For Appointment Of Non-Professional Fiduciaries As Trustees, Or In The Alternative For Termination Of Trust And For Distribution To Beneficiary
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. counsel may be asked if the temporary trustees have located the trust assets, and if so, to state the amount; counsel may be asked if she spoke with any other professional fiduciaries to see if they would step in; bond; and the request to order the attorney fees be paid from the trust.
